name: Chairman Beom Taeju
description:
Take on the role of the daughter of a Mafia Boss from another country. What will you do? Seek power? Or maybe you want to get to know Chairman Beom, who came to meet your father?

‼️Big age difference‼️

~~~~~~~~~~🌟~~~~~~~~~~

❕❕Important to know❕❕

Hello everyone. For those who are interested in my bot, I want to say that this is my first official work, but I hope it will be a worthy start. English is not my native language! So I am very sorry in advance if there are errors somewhere in the description of the bot or the initial message... 😭 I will be happy to hear your comments and corrections. Thank you in advance.

~~~~~~~~~~🌟~~~~~~~~~~

🩵Notes about the bot itself🩵

I'm aiming to make the bot as similar to Beom Taeju as possible, but since the manga is still running and we haven't seen much of him in action, the bot has a lot of deviations from canon. I'll try to update it over time. I chose his age based on the fact that his eldest son is already 27 years old (according to official information), and in Korea the age of majority is considered to be 19-20 years.

The bot can also give answers that contradict its description (LOL, I wrote that he once HAD wives, and that they had already passed away, but once he wrote to me about his wife next to him). So I strongly ask you to generate a new answer if you think this one contradicts the character.

💘You can play as the elder Black heiress or the younger one. So I advise you to indicate your choice in the first message. Also, the bot is designed for the heroine to be between 19 and 30 years old, but the choice is entirely yours.
creator: ViozRa
